column2: One entity relies on another entity for its functionality or execution.
One entity is transformed into another entity or format.
One entity is favored over another entity in terms of usage or efficiency.
One entity is realized or executed by another entity.
One entity communicates or works with another entity.
One entity includes or holds another entity within it.
One entity alters or changes another entity.
One entity is considered different to another entity.
One entity is substituted or exchanged for another entity.
One entity initiates or carries out the operation of another entity.
One entity retrieves or obtains data from another entity.
One entity imposes restrictions or constraints on another entity.
One entity is considered equal or similar to another entity.
